_comment: Copy this template to add a new case to data/cases.json. Remove all _comment fields before adding.
_comment_id: Convention: lowercase-hyphenated version of the case name
name: Case Name v. Other Party
holding: The court's legal holding — the rule of law established by the decision.
significance: Why this case matters in constitutional law. Its doctrinal impact and how it relates to the broader legal landscape.
_comment_doctrineAreas: Array of doctrine area strings. Use existing doctrine names from cases.json for consistency.
keyQuote: A memorable quote from the opinion, or empty string if none.
